headline: Assessing Tapestry (TPR) Valuation After A Strong Year And Rich P/E Multiple
summary: Tapestry’s recent stock performance in focus Tapestry (TPR) has drawn attention after a mixed run in its share price, with a roughly 0.4% decline over the past day, a 6.4% pullback over the past week, and a modest move over the past month. See our latest analysis for Tapestry. While the share price has eased in the very short term, the 90 day share price return of 12.19% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 114.87% suggest momentum has been strong over a longer horizon.
